summary: Validated QualityReviewPanel (Layer 2 + Layer 3 mirror) on /charge-sheet-fusion. Logged in as pc72, seeded localStorage.np_active_case_id='CASE-20260610073343-C30D', auto-resume hydrated quality_review + field_confidence from backend, and ALL 10 data-testid contracts requested by the review request rendered correctly. Empty-state check with TEST001 / CASE-PDF-OCR-TEST confirmed the panel cleanly hides when no quality_review is present. No JS errors originating from QualityReviewPanel.

test_contract_results.panel_renders_between_intelligent_card_a: PASS (visible in screenshot: orange 'Station-Writer Intelligent Charge Sheet' above panel, orange 'Edit & Regenerate' below)
test_contract_results.autofix-0_and_autofix-1_present_only: PASS (autofix-0=1, autofix-1=1, autofix-2=0). Texts: [C2] BNS §117(2) reclassification + [C7] LW-9 missing-from-brief fix
test_contract_results.confidence-group-red_yellow_green: PASS (1 each). Initial chip counts: red=1 (Complainant Caste), yellow=4 (A1 age/phone, A2 phone, LW-5 caste), green=6 visible of 26 total
test_contract_results.audit-checks-grid_with_9_chips_C1..C9: PASS (C1=PASS, C2=FIXED, C3=PASS, C4=PASS, C5=PASS, C6=PASS, C7=FIXED, C8=PASS, C9=PASS) — matches expected exactly
test_contract_results.toggle-show-all-confidence_expands_6_to_: PASS (button 'Show all (31)' → click → 26 green chips, button text becomes 'Collapse'; second click collapses back to 6)
test_contract_results.no_js_console_errors_from_panel: PASS — the only console warnings are pre-existing React hydration warnings about <span> children of <option>/<select> coming from EditAndRegeneratePanel's <select data-testid='correction-field-0'> wrapped by Emergent's x-ve-dynamic <span style=display:contents> instrumentation. Not caused by QualityReviewPanel.

action_items: Optional/non-blocking: the Emergent x-ve-dynamic <span style=display:contents> wrappers injected around <option>/<select> in EditAndRegeneratePanel (ChargeSheetFusion.js lines 1987 & 1994) trigger React dev-mode hydration warnings ('In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of option/select'). Not breaking, but worth knowing — this is independent of the Layer 2 work that was just shipped.
critical_code_review_comments: ChargeSheetFusion.js is 2069 lines — well above the 700-line guideline. QualityReviewPanel (lines 944-1191), FusionCompletedView (1193+), EditAndRegeneratePanel are all in one file. Recommend splitting into /components/chargesheet/QualityReviewPanel.jsx, FusionCompletedView.jsx, EditAndRegeneratePanel.jsx for maintainability.

QualityReviewPanel correctly guards against missing data (`if (!qualityReview && !fieldConfidence) return null;`) and uses defensive defaults (Array.isArray checks, Number.isFinite for pct, lowercase normalization on color). Good defensive coding.

data-testid coverage is excellent on the new panel — every interactive and key informational element is tagged (overall-status, completion-pct, autofix-N, verify-item-N, confidence-group-{color}, confidence-flag-{color}-{path}, audit-CN, toggle-show-all-confidence, audit-checks-grid).
test_credentials: pc72 / Test123! (admin, primary), TEST001 / Test123! (admin, empty-state) — both worked
seed_data_creation: None — used pre-seeded MongoDB data for CASE-20260610073343-C30D as instructed
context_for_next_testing_agent: QualityReviewPanel is fully validated end-to-end as of iteration 20. If the panel's contract changes (new fields, new testids, threshold changes), reuse this same approach: login pc72 → set localStorage np_active_case_id=CASE-20260610073343-C30D → navigate /charge-sheet-fusion → wait ~8s for auto-resume to fire /staging/intelligent-chargesheet/{case_id}. The 9 audit checks, 31 field flags (1R/4Y/26G), 2 autofixes, 4 items_to_verify, completion_pct=78, overall_status=REVIEW_NEEDED are stable in the seeded case. For empty-state regression, use TEST001 + CASE-PDF-OCR-TEST.
rca of the issue: n/a — no issues found in the Layer 2 implementation.
